title: Set up MDX for a blog or docs site in Next.js
summary: Configure @next/mdx for App Router: custom MDX components, frontmatter with gray-matter, syntax highlighting with rehype-pretty-code, and a file-based content system.
declaration: I will set up MDX in this Next.js project using @next/mdx for the App Router. This enables writing blog posts or documentation in Markdown with embedded React components. This uses a file-based content system with no external CMS. If you need a database-backed CMS instead, consider the Payload CMS skill.
